name: Orca
description: Matrilineal cultural intelligence. Distinct pod ecotypes transmit unique hunting traditions — wave-washing seals off ice floes, beaching to catch sea lions, cooperative herring corralling — none of which are genetic. Knowledge passes from grandmother to mother to calf across decades. Post-reproductive females lead pods using accumulated ecological memory, the only non-human species with confirmed menopause tied to wisdom transmission.

core_attributes.neurology: matrilineal cultural memory, cooperative strategy learning
core_attributes.pattern: cultural hunting tradition, post-reproductive leadership, dialect transmission
